problems.title: 問1（グラフ・表）
problems.question:
The following is a placeholder. Replace with your actual assignment text in Japanese/English as used in class.

(1) Describe what the graph or table shows about households with dogs and cats (use percentages; do not confuse percentage with the number of households).

(2) Give your opinion or interpretation in about 80–120 words, with at least one reason.
